'''''Design An Alien''''' was a contest held by ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]'' challenging readers to design an original ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Alien/Legends|alien]] or creature. The contest was announced in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 3|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 3]], with winners revealed in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 7|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 7]]. Additional honorable mentions were included in issues [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 8|8]]–[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 10|10]] within the magazine's "[[Galactic Bazaar]]" department.

[[Leland Chee]] stated that the aliens published for this contest were canon—since rebranded [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]—though in the event of any discrepancies with another source, that source would likely supersede the contest entry.<ref name="Chee">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=690#14724917|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-05-03|time=5:45 PM|quote=Star Wars Galaxy Magazine #7 published the winners of the "Design an Alien" contest, where fans were encouraged to submit artwork and backstories of new SW aliens. Are these aliens canon? [...] Yes, though any text discrepencies with other sources would likely to superceded by the other source.}}</ref>

==Winners==
'''16 years old and over''':
*1st Place: [[Ubese Thorn-Back War Dragon]], by [[Mark Rehkopf]]
*2nd Place: [[Lyco Pibex]], by [[Brendon Fraim]]
*3rd Place: [[Zybahhod Yenyoni]], by [[Jennifer Kay]]
*Honorable mention: [[Rorr'hn of Drgi]], by [[Tom Whalen]]
*Honorable mention: [[Amphi-Hydrus]], by [[Daren Horley]]
*Honorable mention: [[Hepmaga MiOrd]], by [[Jess Lackaff]]
*Honorable mention: [[Sandswimmer]], by [[Tara E. Murphy]]
*Honorable mention: [[Pitrillistian]], by [[Desset Fabien]]
*Honorable mention: [[Hepsalum Tash]], by [[Andrew Foley]]
*Honorable mention: [[Brock Lar]], by [[Matthew Berry]] and [[Craig Farr]]
*Honorable mention: [[Hysalrian/Legends|Hysalrian]], by [[Chuck Hamilton]]
*Honorable mention: [[Vetria Scoth]], by [[Joe Lee]]
*Honorable mention: [[Shao to Gok]] by [[Martin Schlierkamp]]
*Honorable mention: [[Skel|The Skels of Hoth]] by [[Brian Fraim]]

'''Under 16 years old''':
*1st Place: [[Critokian]], by [[Ooi Say Hien]]
*2nd Place: [[Stellan (species)|Stellan]], by [[Chris Cowdrill]]
*3rd Place: [[Tibannuck]], by [[Nathaniel Gabor]]
*Honorable mention: [[Quariped]], by [[Jack Perkins]]
*Honorable mention: [[Jeby]], by [[Paul Rice]]
*Honorable mention: [[Tarron Neb]], by [[Stephen Baker]]
*Honorable mention: [[Scalt]], by [[Mary Burroughs]]
*Honorable mention: [[Wikyochee]], by [[Aaron Reeder]]
